full_text:
Xi Xi
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xi Xi. Officer of Wu who raised troops against He Du, thinking that He Du had replaced Sun Hao. Xi Xi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
